title: Create an npm Script
description: Add a custom script to package.json and use it.
problemStatement:
In the same `my-tool` project from Task 1, add two scripts to `package.json`:
- `start`: runs `node index.js`
- `dev`: runs `nodemon index.js` (you need to install `nodemon` as a devDependency)

Install `nodemon` with the appropriate flag. Then run both scripts using `npm run`.

Verify that `npm run dev` automatically restarts the script when you make changes to `index.js` (change the message and save).
hints: Add to scripts: `"start": "node index.js"` and `"dev": "nodemon index.js"`.
expectedOutput: The script output changes on save when using `dev`.
